channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Al-Sharaa says Syria to stay out of war on Iran unless attacked
item.description: '14 years of war is enough for Syria': Ahmed al-Sharaa says Syria will remain outside the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Emergency workers search for victims of Israeli airstrikes on Beirut
item.description: Emergency workers searched through rubble in Beirut after Israeli airstrikes hit the Jnah neighbourhood.

item.title: Trump tells allies ‘get your own oil’, says Iran war could end in 2-3 weeks
item.description: Under pressure as domestic petrol prices soar, US president says no deal needed to end war on Iran.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says conflict to end in 2-3 weeks; Kuwait airport hit
item.description: US-Israeli strikes continue across Iran, hitting pharmaceutical companies and steel plants in Isfahan and Farokhshar.

item.title: Trump says US will be leaving Iran in two to three weeks
item.description: Speaking to reporters in the Oval Office, US President Donald Trump says US could leave Iran “in two or three weeks."

item.title: Pope Leo urges Trump to end war on Iran
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has urged US President Donald Trump to find an “off-ramp” from the US and Israel’s war on Iran.

item.title: After Strait of Hormuz opens, turmoil would still last months, analysts say
item.description: Effective shutdown of key waterway could lead to permanent changes in how shipping industry does business.

item.title: US exempts Gulf of Mexico oil drillers from endangered species protections
item.description: The Trump administration says protections would diminish US energy competitiveness amid the ongoing war on Iran.

item.title: EU warns oil and gas prices won’t quickly return to normal after Iran war
item.description: The EU’s energy commissioner has warned oil and gas prices will not return to normal any time soon.

item.title: Iran ambassador refuses to leave Lebanon despite expulsion order
item.description: Lebanon has ordered Iran’s ambassador to leave the country, but he has refused to go.
